nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: Maracaibo tody-flycatcher
nodes.summary: Maracaibo tody-flycatcher（Maracaibo tody-flycatcher，学名 Todirostrum viridanum），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于扁轴木属、Gallery forest，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括污染。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 扁轴木属
nodes.summary: 扁轴木属是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Maracaibo tody-flycatcher、Curve-billed thrasher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species primarily inhabits semi-arid and arid coastal scrublands and woodlands where it favors areas with Acacia, Cercidium, Cardon, and Opuntia vegetation

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: To a much lesser extent it is also found in tropical deciduous forest and gallery forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The species primarily inhabits semi-arid and arid coastal scrublands and woodlands where it favors areas with Acacia, Cercidium, Cardon, and Opuntia vegetation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Although expanses of suitable habitat remain within its limited range, substantial areas have been destroyed, principally around Lago de Maracaibo, as a result of burgeoning tourism, development pressures, overgrazing, firewood-gathering and pollution." It is considered fairly common and occurs in several protected areas
